title: 'Ketamine Queen' sentenced to 15 years in Matthew Perry's overdose death
description: Jasveen Sangha was found guilty of selling drugs that killed Friends actor Matthew Perry who had struggled with addiction for years.
content:
A Los Angeles woman dubbed the "Ketamine Queen" has been sentenced to 15 years in prison for selling drugs that led to the death of Friends actor Matthew Perry.
Jasveen Sangha, 42, pleaded guilty last September to five charges, including one count of... [2253 chars]

title: ‘It’s not AI, it’s real’: shock as RSPCA releases images of 250 dogs found at property
description: Dozens of dogs were found crammed into single living room space at property in undisclosed location in UK
content:
More than 250 dogs have been found at a property in scenes so shocking that the RSPCA was forced to deny allegations that the images were faked by artificial intelligence.
The animal welfare charity said it took in 87 dogs from the property at an und... [1916 chars]

title: Israel backs US-Iran ceasefire but Netanyahu's war goals remain unfulfilled
description: The Israeli prime minister's response to the ceasefire has been muted, in contrast to the triumphal statements from the US and Iran.
content:
When Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced the start of the Israeli-US military campaign against Iran at the end of February, he was bullish.
But the tone of the statement from his office acknowledging the ceasefire announced overnight... [6862 chars]

title: Britain breaks solar energy record twice as UK’s biggest solar farm gets approval
description: Record high set on Monday and raised on Tuesday, with 14.4GW of electricity generated in sunny spring weather
content:
Britain’s sunny spring weather powered the grid to new solar energy records on two consecutive days this week.
Solar farms in England, Wales and Scotland generated 14.1GW of low-carbon electricity at lunchtime on Monday, surpassing the previous high ... [2369 chars]

title: UK weather: temperature tops 26C on one of hottest April days of past 80 years
description: High of 26.5C recorded in Kew Gardens in south-west London but rain and cooler conditions are on the way
content:
Temperatures soared in parts of the UK as the country recorded its warmest day of the year so far – and one of the hottest April days in the last 80 years.
